verses.latin_vulgate: Porro filii Issachar : Thola, et Phua, Jasub, et Simeron, quatuor.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלִבְנֵ֣י יִשָּׂשכָ֗ר תּוֹלָ֧ע וּפוּאָ֛ה (ישיב) [יָשׁ֥וּב] וְשִׁמְר֖וֹן אַרְבָּעָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Now the sons of Issachar were, Tola, and Puah, Jashub, and Shimron, four.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Thola : Ozi, et Raphaia, et Jeriel, et Jemai, et Jebsem, et Samuel, principes per domos cognationum suarum. De stirpe Thola viri fortissimi numerati sunt in diebus David, viginti duo millia sexcenti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֣י תוֹלָ֗ע עֻזִּ֡י וּרְפָיָ֡ה וִ֠ירִיאֵ֠ל וְיַחְמַ֨י וְיִבְשָׂ֜ם וּשְׁמוּאֵ֗ל רָאשִׁ֤ים לְבֵית־אֲבוֹתָם֙ לְתוֹלָ֔ע גִּבּ֥וֹרֵי חַ֖יִל לְתֹלְדוֹתָ֑ם מִסְפָּרָם֙ בִּימֵ֣י דָוִ֔יד עֶשְׂרִֽים־וּשְׁנַ֥יִם אֶ֖לֶף וְשֵׁ֥שׁ מֵאֽוֹת׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And the sons of Tola; Uzzi, and Rephaiah, and Jeriel, and Jahmai, and Jibsam, and Shemuel, heads of their father’s house, to wit, of Tola: they were valiant men of might in their generations; whose number was in the days of David two and twenty thousand and six hundred.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Ozi : Izrahia, de quo nati sunt Michaël, et Obadia, et Joël, et Jesia, quinque omnes principes.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֥י עֻזִּ֖י יִֽזְרַֽחְיָ֑ה וּבְנֵ֣י יִֽזְרַֽחְיָ֗ה מִיכָאֵ֡ל וְ֠עֹבַדְיָ֠ה וְיוֹאֵ֧ל יִשִּׁיָּ֛ה חֲמִשָּׁ֖ה רָאשִׁ֥ים כֻּלָּֽם׃
verses.king_james: And the sons of Uzzi; Izrahiah: and the sons of Izrahiah; Michael, and Obadiah, and Joel, Ishiah, five: all of them chief men.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque eis per familias et populos suos, accincti ad prælium, viri fortissimi, triginta sex millia : multas enim habuerunt uxores, et filios.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַעֲלֵיהֶ֨ם לְתֹלְדוֹתָ֜ם לְבֵ֣ית אֲבוֹתָ֗ם גְּדוּדֵי֙ צְבָ֣א מִלְחָמָ֔ה שְׁלֹשִׁ֥ים וְשִׁשָּׁ֖ה אָ֑לֶף כִּי־הִרְבּ֥וּ נָשִׁ֖ים וּבָנִֽים׃
verses.king_james: And with them, by their generations, after the house of their fathers, were bands of soldiers for war, six and thirty thousand men: for they had many wives and sons.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fratres quoque eorum per omnem cognationem Issachar robustissimi ad pugnandum, octoginta septem millia numerati sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲחֵיהֶ֗ם לְכֹל֙ מִשְׁפְּח֣וֹת יִשָּׂשכָ֔ר גִּבּוֹרֵ֖י חֲיָלִ֑ים שְׁמוֹנִ֤ים וְשִׁבְעָה֙ אֶ֔לֶף הִתְיַחְשָׂ֖ם לַכֹּֽל׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And their brethren among all the families of Issachar were valiant men of might, reckoned in all by their genealogies fourscore and seven thousand.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Benjamin : Bela, et Bechor, et Jadihel, tres.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בִּנְיָמִ֗ן בֶּ֧לַע וָבֶ֛כֶר וִידִֽיעֲאֵ֖ל שְׁלֹשָֽׁה׃
verses.king_james: The sons of Benjamin; Bela, and Becher, and Jediael, three.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Bela : Esbon, et Ozi, et Oziel, et Jerimoth, et Urai, quinque principes familiarum, et ad pugnandum robustissimi : numerus autem eorum, viginti duo millia et triginta quatuor.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֣י בֶ֗לַע אֶצְבּ֡וֹן וְעֻזִּ֡י וְ֠עֻזִּיאֵ֠ל וִירִימ֨וֹת וְעִירִ֜י חֲמִשָּׁ֗ה רָאשֵׁי֙ בֵּ֣ית אָב֔וֹת גִּבּוֹרֵ֖י חֲיָלִ֑ים וְהִתְיַחְשָׂ֗ם עֶשְׂרִ֤ים וּשְׁנַ֙יִם֙ אֶ֔לֶף וּשְׁלֹשִׁ֖ים וְאַרְבָּעָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And the sons of Bela; Ezbon, and Uzzi, and Uzziel, and Jerimoth, and Iri, five; heads of the house of their fathers, mighty men of valour; and were reckoned by their genealogies twenty and two thousand and thirty and four.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro filii Bechor : Zamira, et Joas, et Eliezer, et Elioënai, et Amri, et Jerimoth, et Abia, et Anathoth, et Almath : omnes hi filii Bechor.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֣י בֶ֗כֶר זְמִירָ֡ה וְיוֹעָ֡שׁ וֶֽ֠אֱלִיעֶ֠זֶר וְאֶלְיוֹעֵינַ֤י וְעׇמְרִי֙ וִירֵמ֣וֹת וַאֲבִיָּ֔ה וַעֲנָת֖וֹת וְעָלָ֑מֶת כׇּל־אֵ֖לֶּה בְּנֵי־בָֽכֶר׃
verses.king_james: And the sons of Becher; Zemira, and Joash, and Eliezer, and Elioenai, and Omri, and Jerimoth, and Abiah, and Anathoth, and Alameth. All these are the sons of Becher.

verses.latin_vulgate: Numerati sunt autem per familias suas principes cognationum suarum ad bella fortissimi, viginti millia et ducenti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִתְיַחְשָׂ֣ם לְתֹלְדוֹתָ֗ם רָאשֵׁי֙ בֵּ֣ית אֲבוֹתָ֔ם גִּבּוֹרֵ֖י חָ֑יִל עֶשְׂרִ֥ים אֶ֖לֶף וּמָאתָֽיִם׃
verses.king_james: And the number of them, after their genealogy by their generations, heads of the house of their fathers, mighty men of valour, was twenty thousand and two hundred.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro filii Jadihel : Balan. Filii autem Balan : Jehus, et Benjamin, et Aod, et Chanana, et Zethan, et Tharsis, et Ahisahar :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֥י יְדִיעֲאֵ֖ל בִּלְהָ֑ן וּבְנֵ֣י בִלְהָ֗ן (יעיש) [יְע֡וּשׁ] וּ֠בִנְיָמִ֠ן וְאֵה֤וּד וּֽכְנַעֲנָה֙ וְזֵיתָ֔ן וְתַרְשִׁ֖ישׁ וַאֲחִישָֽׁחַר׃
verses.king_james: The sons also of Jediael; Bilhan: and the sons of Bilhan; Jeush, and Benjamin, and Ehud, and Chenaanah, and Zethan, and Tharshish, and Ahishahar.

verses.latin_vulgate: omnes hi filii Jadihel, principes cognationum suarum viri fortissimi, decem et septem millia et ducenti ad prælium procedentes.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־אֵ֜לֶּה בְּנֵ֤י יְדִֽיעֲאֵל֙ לְרָאשֵׁ֣י הָאָב֔וֹת גִּבּוֹרֵ֖י חֲיָלִ֑ים שִׁבְעָֽה־עָשָׂ֥ר אֶ֙לֶף֙ וּמָאתַ֔יִם יֹצְאֵ֥י צָבָ֖א לַמִּלְחָמָֽה׃
verses.king_james: All these the sons of Jediael, by the heads of their fathers, mighty men of valour, were seventeen thousand and two hundred soldiers, fit to go out for war and battle.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sepham quoque et Hapham filii Hir : et Hasim filii Aher.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשֻׁפִּ֤ם וְחֻפִּם֙ בְּנֵ֣י עִ֔יר חֻשִׁ֖ם בְּנֵ֥י אַחֵֽר׃
verses.king_james: Shuppim also, and Huppim, the children of Ir, and Hushim, the sons of Aher.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii autem Nephthali : Jaziel, et Guni, et Jeser, et Sellum, filii Bala.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י נַפְתָּלִ֗י יַחֲצִיאֵ֧ל וְגוּנִ֛י וְיֵ֥צֶר וְשַׁלּ֖וּם בְּנֵ֥י בִלְהָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: The sons of Naphtali; Jahziel, and Guni, and Jezer, and Shallum, the sons of Bilhah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro filius Manasse, Esriel : concubinaque ejus Syra peperit Machir patrem Galaad.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י מְנַשֶּׁ֔ה אַשְׂרִיאֵ֖ל אֲשֶׁ֣ר יָלָ֑דָה פִּֽילַגְשׁוֹ֙ הָֽאֲרַמִּיָּ֔ה יָלְדָ֕ה אֶת־מָכִ֖יר אֲבִ֥י גִלְעָֽד׃
verses.king_james: The sons of Manasseh; Ashriel, whom she bare: (but his concubine the Aramitess bare Machir the father of Gilead:

verses.latin_vulgate: Machir autem accepit uxores filiis suis Happhim, et Saphan : et habuit sororem nomine Maacha : nomen autem secundi, Salphaad, natæque sunt Salphaad filiæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמָכִ֞יר לָקַ֤ח אִשָּׁה֙ לְחֻפִּ֣ים וּלְשֻׁפִּ֔ים וְשֵׁ֤ם אֲחֹתוֹ֙ מַֽעֲכָ֔ה וְשֵׁ֥ם הַשֵּׁנִ֖י צְלׇפְחָ֑ד וַתִּהְיֶ֥נָה לִצְלׇפְחָ֖ד בָּנֽוֹת׃
verses.king_james: And Machir took to wife the sister of Huppim and Shuppim, whose sister’s name was Maachah;) and the name of the second was Zelophehad: and Zelophehad had daughters.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et peperit Maacha uxor Machir filium, vocavitque nomen ejus Phares : porro nomen fratris ejus, Sares : et filii ejus, Ulam, et Recen.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתֵּ֨לֶד מַעֲכָ֤ה אֵֽשֶׁת־מָכִיר֙ בֵּ֔ן וַתִּקְרָ֤א שְׁמוֹ֙ פֶּ֔רֶשׁ וְשֵׁ֥ם אָחִ֖יו שָׁ֑רֶשׁ וּבָנָ֖יו אוּלָ֥ם וָרָֽקֶם׃
verses.king_james: And Maachah the wife of Machir bare a son, and she called his name Peresh; and the name of his brother was Sheresh; and his sons were Ulam and Rakem.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filius autem Ulam, Badan : hi sunt filii Galaad, filii Machir, filii Manasse.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֥י אוּלָ֖ם בְּדָ֑ן אֵ֚לֶּה בְּנֵ֣י גִלְעָ֔ד בֶּן־מָכִ֖יר בֶּן־מְנַשֶּֽׁה׃
verses.king_james: And the sons of Ulam; Bedan. These were the sons of Gilead, the son of Machir, the son of Manasseh.

verses.latin_vulgate: Soror autem ejus Regina peperit Virum decorum, et Abiezer, et Mohola.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲחֹת֖וֹ הַמֹּלֶ֑כֶת יָֽלְדָה֙ אֶת־אִ֣ישְׁה֔וֹד וְאֶת־אֲבִיעֶ֖זֶר וְאֶת־מַחְלָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And his sister Hammoleketh bare Ishod, and Abiezer, and Mahalah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Erant autem filii Semida, Ahin, et Sechem, et Leci, et Aniam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּהְי֖וּ בְּנֵ֣י שְׁמִידָ֑ע אַחְיָ֣ן וָשֶׁ֔כֶם וְלִקְחִ֖י וַאֲנִיעָֽם׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: And the sons of Shemida were, Ahian, and Shechem, and Likhi, and Aniam.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii autem Ephraim : Suthala, Bared filius ejus, Thahath filius ejus, Elada filius ejus, Thahath filius ejus, hujus filius Zabad,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֥י אֶפְרַ֖יִם שׁוּתָ֑לַח וּבֶ֤רֶד בְּנוֹ֙ וְתַ֣חַת בְּנ֔וֹ וְאֶלְעָדָ֥ה בְנ֖וֹ וְתַ֥חַת בְּנֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: And the sons of Ephraim; Shuthelah, and Bered his son, and Tahath his son, and Eladah his son, and Tahath his son,

verses.latin_vulgate: et hujus filius Suthula, et hujus filius Ezer et Elad : occiderunt autem eos viri Geth indigenæ, quia descenderant ut invaderent possessiones eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְזָבָ֥ד בְּנ֛וֹ וְשׁוּתֶ֥לַח בְּנ֖וֹ וְעֵ֣זֶר וְאֶלְעָ֑ד וַהֲרָג֗וּם אַנְשֵׁי־גַת֙ הַנּוֹלָדִ֣ים בָּאָ֔רֶץ כִּ֣י יָֽרְד֔וּ לָקַ֖חַת אֶת־מִקְנֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: And Zabad his son, and Shuthelah his son, and Ezer, and Elead, whom the men of Gath that were born in that land slew, because they came down to take away their cattle.

verses.latin_vulgate: Luxit igitur Ephraim pater eorum multis diebus, et venerunt fratres ejus ut consolarentur eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתְאַבֵּ֛ל אֶפְרַ֥יִם אֲבִיהֶ֖ם יָמִ֣ים רַבִּ֑ים וַיָּבֹ֥אוּ אֶחָ֖יו לְנַחֲמֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: And Ephraim their father mourned many days, and his brethren came to comfort him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ingressusque est ad uxorem suam : quæ concepit, et peperit filium, et vocavit nomen ejus Beria, eo quod in malis domus ejus ortus esset :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֹא֙ אֶל־אִשְׁתּ֔וֹ וַתַּ֖הַר וַתֵּ֣לֶד בֵּ֑ן וַיִּקְרָ֤א אֶת־שְׁמוֹ֙ בְּרִיעָ֔ה כִּ֥י בְרָעָ֖ה הָיְתָ֥ה בְּבֵיתֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: And when he went in to his wife, she conceived, and bare a son, and he called his name Beriah, because it went evil with his house.

verses.latin_vulgate: filia autem ejus fuit Sara, quæ ædificavit Bethoron inferiorem et superiorem, et Ozensara.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבִתּ֣וֹ שֶֽׁאֱרָ֔ה וַתִּ֧בֶן אֶת־בֵּית־חוֹר֛וֹן הַתַּחְתּ֖וֹן וְאֶת־הָעֶלְי֑וֹן וְאֵ֖ת אֻזֵּ֥ן שֶׁאֱרָֽה׃
verses.king_james: (And his daughter was Sherah, who built Beth–horon the nether, and the upper, and Uzzen–sherah.)

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro filius ejus Rapha, et Reseph, et Thale, de quo natus est Thaan,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְרֶ֣פַח בְּנ֗וֹ וְרֶ֧שֶׁף וְתֶ֛לַח בְּנ֖וֹ וְתַ֥חַן בְּנֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: And Rephah was his son, also Resheph, and Telah his son, and Tahan his son,

verses.latin_vulgate: qui genuit Laadan : hujus quoque filius Ammiud, qui genuit Elisama,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לַעְדָּ֥ן בְּנ֛וֹ עַמִּיה֥וּד בְּנ֖וֹ אֱלִישָׁמָ֥ע בְּנֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Laadan his son, Ammihud his son, Elishama his son,

verses.latin_vulgate: de quo ortus est Nun, qui habuit filium Josue.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נ֥וֹן בְּנ֖וֹ יְהוֹשֻׁ֥עַ בְּנֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Non his son, Jehoshua his son.

verses.latin_vulgate: Possessio autem eorum et habitatio, Bethel cum filiabus suis, et contra orientem Noran, ad occidentalem plagam Gazer et filiæ ejus, Sichem quoque cum filiabus suis, usque ad Aza cum filiabus ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽאֲחֻזָּתָם֙ וּמֹ֣שְׁבוֹתָ֔ם בֵּֽית־אֵ֖ל וּבְנֹתֶ֑יהָ וְלַמִּזְרָ֣ח נַעֲרָ֔ן וְלַֽמַּעֲרָ֗ב גֶּ֤זֶר וּבְנֹתֶ֙יהָ֙ וּשְׁכֶ֣ם וּבְנֹתֶ֔יהָ עַד־עַיָּ֖ה וּבְנֹתֶֽיהָ׃
verses.king_james: And their possessions and habitations were, Beth–el and the towns thereof, and eastward Naaran, and westward Gezer, with the towns thereof; Shechem also and the towns thereof, unto Gaza and the towns thereof:

verses.latin_vulgate: Juxta filios quoque Manasse, Bethsan et filias ejus, Thanach et filias ejus, Mageddo et filias ejus, Dor et filias ejus : in his habitaverunt filii Joseph, filii Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַל־יְדֵ֣י בְנֵֽי־מְנַשֶּׁ֗ה בֵּית־שְׁאָ֤ן וּבְנֹתֶ֙יהָ֙ תַּעְנַ֣ךְ וּבְנֹתֶ֔יהָ מְגִדּ֥וֹ וּבְנוֹתֶ֖יהָ דּ֣וֹר וּבְנוֹתֶ֑יהָ בְּאֵ֙לֶּה֙ יָֽשְׁב֔וּ בְּנֵ֥י יוֹסֵ֖ף בֶּן־יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: And by the borders of the children of Manasseh, Beth–shean and her towns, Taanach and her towns, Megiddo and her towns, Dor and her towns. In these dwelt the children of Joseph the son of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Aser : Jemna, et Jesua, et Jessui, et Baria, et Sara soror eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י אָשֵׁ֗ר יִמְנָ֧ה וְיִשְׁוָ֛ה וְיִשְׁוִ֥י וּבְרִיעָ֖ה וְשֶׂ֥רַח אֲחוֹתָֽם׃
verses.king_james: The sons of Asher; Imnah, and Isuah, and Ishuai, and Beriah, and Serah their sister.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii autem Baria : Heber, et Melchiel : ipse est pater Barsaith.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֣י בְרִיעָ֔ה חֶ֖בֶר וּמַלְכִּיאֵ֑ל ה֖וּא אֲבִ֥י (ברזות) [בִרְזָֽיִת]׃
verses.king_james: And the sons of Beriah; Heber, and Malchiel, who is the father of Birzavith.

verses.latin_vulgate: Heber autem genuit Jephlat, et Somer, et Hotham, et Suaa sororem eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְחֶ֙בֶר֙ הוֹלִ֣יד אֶת־יַפְלֵ֔ט וְאֶת־שׁוֹמֵ֖ר וְאֶת־חוֹתָ֑ם וְאֵ֖ת שׁוּעָ֥א אֲחוֹתָֽם׃
verses.king_james: And Heber begat Japhlet, and Shomer, and Hotham, and Shua their sister.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Jephlat : Phosech, et Chamaal, et Asoth : hi filii Jephlat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֣י יַפְלֵ֔ט פָּסַ֥ךְ וּבִמְהָ֖ל וְעַשְׁוָ֑ת אֵ֖לֶּה בְּנֵ֥י יַפְלֵֽט׃
verses.king_james: And the sons of Japhlet; Pasach, and Bimhal, and Ashvath. These are the children of Japhlet.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro filii Somer : Ahi, et Roaga, et Haba, et Aram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֖י שָׁ֑מֶר אֲחִ֥י (ורוהגה) [וְרׇהְגָּ֖ה] (יחבה) [וְחֻבָּ֥ה] וַאֲרָֽם׃
verses.king_james: And the sons of Shamer; Ahi, and Rohgah, Jehubbah, and Aram.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii autem Helem fratris ejus : Supha, et Jemna, et Selles, et Amal.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבֶן־הֵ֖לֶם אָחִ֑יו צוֹפַ֥ח וְיִמְנָ֖ע וְשֵׁ֥לֶשׁ וְעָמָֽל׃
verses.king_james: And the sons of his brother Helem; Zophah, and Imna, and Shelesh, and Amal.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Supha : Sue, Harnapher, et Sual, et Beri, et Jamra,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֖י צוֹפָ֑ח ס֧וּחַ וְחַרְנֶ֛פֶר וְשׁוּעָ֖ל וּבֵרִ֥י וְיִמְרָֽה׃
verses.king_james: The sons of Zophah; Suah, and Harnepher, and Shual, and Beri, and Imrah,

verses.latin_vulgate: Bosor, et Hod, et Samma, et Salusa, et Jethran, et Bera.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּ֣צֶר וָה֗וֹד וְשַׁמָּ֧א וְשִׁלְשָׁ֛ה וְיִתְרָ֖ן וּבְאֵרָֽא׃
verses.king_james: Bezer, and Hod, and Shamma, and Shilshah, and Ithran, and Beera.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Jether : Jephone, et Phaspha, et Ara.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֖י יֶ֑תֶר יְפֻנֶּ֥ה וּפִסְפָּ֖ה וַאְרָֽא׃
verses.king_james: And the sons of Jether; Jephunneh, and Pispah, and Ara.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii autem Olla : Aree, et Haniel, et Resia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֖י עֻלָּ֑א אָרַ֥ח וְחַנִּיאֵ֖ל וְרִצְיָֽא׃
verses.king_james: And the sons of Ulla; Arah, and Haniel, and Rezia.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnes hi filii Aser, principes cognationum, electi atque fortissimi duces ducum : numerus autem eorum ætatis quæ apta esset ad bellum, viginti sex millia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־אֵ֣לֶּה בְנֵֽי־אָ֠שֵׁ֠ר רָאשֵׁ֨י בֵית־הָאָב֤וֹת בְּרוּרִים֙ גִּבּוֹרֵ֣י חֲיָלִ֔ים רָאשֵׁ֖י הַנְּשִׂיאִ֑ים וְהִתְיַחְשָׂ֤ם בַּצָּבָא֙ בַּמִּלְחָמָ֔ה מִסְפָּרָ֣ם אֲנָשִׁ֔ים עֶשְׂרִ֥ים וְשִׁשָּׁ֖ה אָֽלֶף׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: All these were the children of Asher, heads of their father’s house, choice and mighty men of valour, chief of the princes. And the number throughout the genealogy of them that were apt to the war and to battle was twenty and six thousand men.
